arts.ttl: Tottenham star is club’s number one target for summer – ‘Attracted to project’ and they have trump card
arts.sum: Tottenham defender Cuti Romero is Atletico Madrid’s number one transfer target for the summer transfer window. That’s according to AS, who say the Spanish side ‘will make an effort’ to get Romero out of Tottenham this summer but know negotiations will be difficult. arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou did something bizarre during the build-up to Tottenham's clash with Frankfurt in Germany on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Troy Deeney names four Tottenham players that need to be AXED for the club to bounce back next season - as he pinpoints the type of player Spurs are 'missing'
arts.sum: Deeney insisted that the overriding issue for Spurs is a lack of leaders in the dressing room resulting in a lack of identity from the club as a whole.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's uncomfortable moment and what Johan Lange and Scott Munn were doing in Frankfurt
arts.sum: But body-wise I'm feeling really well and really good - why I don’t play every week you will have to ask the gaffer for thi," said the 23-year-old. "We all still have the trust in the gaffer and still have trust in the way he's playing, so tomorrow we want to win the game of course for him, but also for us, also for the club, and also for the fans," he said.

arts.ttl: Official | Eintracht Frankfurt sign Rasmus Kristensen on permanent basis from Leeds
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt's permanent purchase of Danish fullback Rasmus Kristensen from Leeds United has been officially confirmed.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou "couldn't care less" about Tottenham sack rumours ahead of crucial Europa League clash
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou insists that he "couldn't care less" about rumours of being sacked by Tottenham Hotspur, even if they manage to win the Europa League this season.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs defender 'wants to leave' if Real Madrid come calling this summer
arts.sum: Micky van de Ven would like to leave Tottenham Hotspur this summer if Real Madrid make an offer for his services, according to a report.
